overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student walking along an outdoor castle terrace with mountain views, approaching the main entrance, entering the grand hall with ornate marble floors, and ascending the main staircase. The video transitions from overcast outdoor courtyard to the dimly lit gothic interior.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the castle terrace toward the main building

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking in the same direction along the terrace

entered.detail: tall dark stone castle wall with tall narrow windows
ornate stone balustrade overlooking the landscape
distant green hills and mountains under overcast sky
large grey stone tiles with moss growing in the gaps
black iron lamp post on the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open castle terrace with stone pavement, bordered by a stone railing on the right overlooking distant mountains. The gothic castle wall rises on the left, and a few other students walk scattered along the path.

events.description: character turns slightly to align with the path toward the main entrance doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden entrance doors of the castle

notable_agents.action: group of students standing and conversing near the entrance

entered.detail: massive ornate wooden doors with metal studs and geometric patterns
tall stone towers with pointed spires rising above the castle
ornate stone arch framing the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the castle's main entrance, with the massive wooden doors and gothic towers becoming prominent. Other students gather near the entrance as the camera moves through the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with circular floor pattern

events.description: character opens the large wooden doors and enters the castle interior
character begins ascending the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and walking across the ornate floor toward the staircase

entered.detail: large vaulted hall with high ceilings and stone columns
circular patterned marble floor with red and gold designs
large hanging chandelier with multiple candles
wide stone staircase with ornate railings splitting left and right

segments.scene_description: The character enters the grand entrance hall, transitioning from the overcast exterior to the ornate interior with patterned marble floors and high vaulted ceilings. The camera crosses the hall toward the grand staircase.

events.description: character continues ascending the spiral staircase, turning with the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase, passing other students and portraits on the walls

entered.detail: framed paintings hanging on the stone walls
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm light
ornate carved stone balustrades along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase, passing wall portraits and ornate railings. The lighting shifts to warm artificial sconces as the camera climbs higher into the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an overcast outdoor castle terrace into the warm, ornate depths of the school's interior. It begins by tracking a student along a stone pavement bordered by a railing overlooking distant mountains, with gothic walls rising on the left. As the camera moves forward, the path leads toward the massive wooden doors of the main entrance where other students gather beneath towering gothic spires. The scene then shifts from the gray exterior into the grand entrance hall, gliding across patterned marble floors and beneath high vaulted ceilings. Finally, the camera ascends the grand staircase, passing wall portraits as the lighting transitions from natural daylight to the warm glow of artificial sconces.
